revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-220 

An instrument by which the relative density of the electrolyte in a cell may be measured for the purpose of determining the state of charge of the cell.

{{IALAFooter}}
